title: angelica wheeleri
intro: Angelica wheeleri, also known as Yutan or Wild Angelica, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Angelica wheeleri include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving respiratory function, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as bronchitis, fever, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of the plant are typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
